product_overview: E-Canteen is a mobile-first web app for school pre-ordering that lets users browse tenant menus, pre-order and pay via virtual balance or Midtrans, and enables tenant admins to manage queues and menus. The system is multi-tenant, supports role-based access, and integrates Midtrans webhooks for payment/top-up processing.
core_goals: Reduce physical canteen queue wait times by enabling pre-orders and scheduled pickup (BREAK_1/BREAK_2).
Provide reliable, tenant-isolated order and menu management for canteen admins.
Support secure payments and balance top-ups via Midtrans and maintain accurate balance/transaction history.
Ensure data integrity for orders and balance operations using transactional operations to prevent double-spend.
Provide Super Admin tools for multi-tenant management, user role and balance adjustments, and system-wide reporting.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Credential-based user registration/login and session retrieval using Auth.js v5 to authenticate users and surface role/tenant context.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with {email, password} (valid credentials) -> Receive 200 with JWT/session token -> POST /api/auth/session with session token -> Receive 200 with session object (user id, role, tenantId)
POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with {email, password} (invalid password) -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Create orders (BALANCE or MIDTRANS), manage order lifecycle (PENDING -> CONFIRMED -> PREPARING -> READY -> COMPLETED), cancel orders with refunds where applicable, and tenant-specific order queues for admins.
user_flows: POST /actions/createOrder with auth token and body {tenantId, items:[{menuId, quantity}], pickupTime:BREAK_1, paymentMethod:BALANCE, notes} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{orderId}} (balance deducted atomically)
POST /actions/createOrder with auth token and body {tenantId, items, pickupTime, paymentMethod:BALANCE} where user balance insufficient -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Insufficient balance'}

POST /actions/createOrder with auth token and body {tenantId, items, pickupTime, paymentMethod:MIDTRANS} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{orderId}} -> POST /actions/createMidtransOrderToken with auth token and {orderId} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{token}} (user completes payment via Midtrans)
POST /actions/cancelOrder with auth token and {orderId} for order in PENDING or CONFIRMED -> Receive 200 {success:true} (refund processed to balance if original payment was BALANCE)
POST /actions/cancelOrder with auth token and {orderId} for order in COMPLETED -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Cannot cancel completed order'}

POST /actions/updateOrderStatus with admin auth token and {orderId, status:CONFIRMED} -> Receive 200 {success:true} -> POST /actions/updateOrderStatus with admin auth token and {orderId, status:READY} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/updateOrderStatus with non-admin/auth token attempting cross-tenant order -> Receive 403 {success:false, error:'Forbidden'}

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: Tenant-scoped CRUD for menu items including photo URL, price, description, and availability toggle; deletion is blocked if there are active orders referencing the menu item.
user_flows: POST /actions/createMenu with admin auth token and body {name, price, description, category, photoUrl} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{menuId}}
POST /actions/updateMenu with admin auth token and body {menuId, name, price} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/toggleMenuAvailability with admin auth token and body {menuId, isAvailable:true} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/deleteMenu with admin auth token and body {menuId} when menu has no active orders -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/deleteMenu with admin auth token and body {menuId} when menu is referenced by active orders -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Cannot delete menu with active orders'}

features.name: Balance & Payment
features.description: Support top-ups (via Midtrans Snap token), create Midtrans tokens for MIDTRANS order payments, and provide balance transaction history (top-ups, purchases, refunds).
user_flows: POST /actions/createMidtransTopUpToken with auth token and body {amount:20000} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{token, orderId}} (user completes payment via Midtrans client)

POST /api/webhooks/midtrans with Midtrans notification body including valid signature_key -> Receive 200 {status:'ok'} -> POST /actions/getBalanceHistory with auth token -> Receive 200 {success:true, data: [BalanceTransaction,...]} (top-up reflected)
POST /actions/createMidtransTopUpToken with auth token and body {amount:5000} (below minimum) -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Amount must be between 10000 and 500000'}
POST /actions/createMidtransOrderToken with auth token and body {orderId} (valid MIDTRANS order) -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{token}}
POST /actions/createMidtransOrderToken with auth token and body {orderId:'invalid'} -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Order not found or not payable'}

features.name: Midtrans Webhook
features.description: HTTP endpoint to receive Midtrans payment notifications, verify SHA512 signature, update order/top-up status, and credit user balance for top-ups or refunds.
user_flows: POST /api/webhooks/midtrans with notification body and valid signature_key -> Receive 200 {status:'ok'} (order/top-up status updated or balance credited)
POST /api/webhooks/midtrans with notification body and invalid signature_key -> Receive 401 {error:'Invalid signature'}

features.name: Tenant Management
features.description: Super Admin-managed tenant CRUD that creates a tenant and associated admin user in a single transaction, updates tenant metadata, and deletes tenant data with cascade behavior.
user_flows: POST /actions/createTenant with super-admin auth token and body {name, adminEmail, adminName, adminPassword, description} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:{tenantId}} (tenant and admin user created in transaction)
POST /actions/createTenant with non-super-admin auth token -> Receive 403 {success:false, error:'Forbidden'}
POST /actions/updateTenant with super-admin auth token and body {tenantId, name:'New Name'} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/deleteTenant with super-admin auth token and body {tenantId} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/deleteTenant with super-admin auth token and body {tenantId} that fails cascade constraints -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Delete failed due to dependent data'}

features.name: User Management
features.description: SUPER_ADMIN tooling to list users, change roles, and manually adjust user balances with reasons (audit-friendly).
user_flows: POST /actions/getAllUsers with super-admin auth token and body {role:'USER', search:'arya'} -> Receive 200 {success:true, data:[User,...]}
POST /actions/getAllUsers with non-super-admin auth token -> Receive 403 {success:false, error:'Forbidden'}
POST /actions/updateUserRole with super-admin auth token and body {userId, role:'ADMIN'} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/adjustUserBalance with super-admin auth token and body {userId, amount:50000, type:'INCREMENT', reason:'Manual top-up'} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/adjustUserBalance with super-admin auth token and body {userId, amount:-100, type:'DECREMENT', reason:''} -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Invalid amount or reason'}

features.name: Notifications
features.description: User notification retrieval and read-state operations to surface order updates and admin messages.
user_flows: POST /actions/getNotifications with auth token -> Receive 200 Notification[] (list of notifications with read/unread states)
POST /actions/markAsRead with auth token and body {notificationId} -> Receive 200 {success:true}
POST /actions/markAsRead with auth token and body {notificationId:'invalid'} -> Receive 400 {success:false, error:'Notification not found'}
POST /actions/markAllAsRead with auth token -> Receive 200 {success:true}

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User registration and login with credentials-based authentication via Auth.js v5

endpoints.description: Login with email and password credentials
Get current session

response_schema.200: Session object with user id, role, tenantId

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Create orders with balance or Midtrans payment, update order status (admin), cancel orders with refunds

endpoints.description: Create a new order with items, pickup time, and payment method. Deducts balance if BALANCE payment.
Admin updates order status with valid transitions. Handles refunds on cancellation.
User cancels their own PENDING or CONFIRMED order. Refunds balance if applicable.

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: CRUD operations for menu items with photo upload, tenant-isolated

endpoints.description: Create a new menu item under admin's tenant
Update a menu item (partial update allowed)
Delete a menu item (blocked if active orders exist)
Toggle menu item availability on/off

features.name: Balance & Payment
features.description: Balance top-up via Midtrans, order payment tokens, balance history

endpoints.description: Create a Midtrans Snap token for balance top-up
Create a Midtrans Snap token for an existing MIDTRANS order
Get user's balance transaction history (purchases, top-ups, refunds)

features.name: Midtrans Webhook
features.description: Handles payment notifications from Midtrans for order payments and balance top-ups

endpoints.description: Receive and process Midtrans payment notifications. Verifies SHA512 signature, updates order/top-up status, credits balance.

features.name: Tenant Management
features.description: CRUD for tenants (canteens) by Super Admin with admin user creation

endpoints.description: Create a new tenant with admin user in a transaction
Update tenant name or description
Delete tenant with cascade (orders, menus, admin role reset)

features.name: User Management
features.description: SUPER_ADMIN user listing, role updates, balance adjustments

endpoints.description: List all users with optional role filter and search
Change a user's role (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Manually increment or decrement user balance with reason
Get user notifications with limit
Mark a single notification as read
Mark all unread notifications as read

known_limitations.issue: Server Actions are not traditional REST endpoints - they are Next.js Server Actions invoked via POST with encrypted action IDs
known_limitations.impact: Cannot be tested via standard HTTP calls without Next.js runtime. Only the webhook endpoint at /api/webhooks/midtrans is a true HTTP API route.

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on authentication endpoints
File upload accepts up to 15MB input before compression
known_limitations.impact: Large uploads may cause memory pressure
